content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Domino piling". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/50/A
content.inputFormat: The program should read two integers: m and n, which represent the number of rows and columns in the room.
content.outputFormat: The program should print the maximum number of dominoes that can be placed in the room.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: To find the maximum number of dominoes that can be placed in the room, we need to divide the total area of the room by the area of a single domino.

code.Python3:
m, n = map(int, input().split())
print((m * n) // 2)
